daniel-negreanu.reason: Daniel Negreanu may appear in multiple contexts such as All-Time Earnings, POY, Hall of Fame, and profile biography. Search/result uniqueness rules may need special handling.

stage-avatar-missing.reason: Stage environment may not expose the same avatar assets as production. Treat missing avatar as warning when ENVIRONMENT=stage.

michael-mizrachi.reason: Michael Mizrachi may have unstable search results or autocomplete responses from WSOP API. Treat autocomplete missing as warning.

phil-ivey.reason: Phil Ivey may have unstable search results or autocomplete responses from WSOP API. Treat autocomplete missing as warning.
